calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2005 Continued To Jul-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-18-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prov-Up Hearing.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
John Zanghi, Esq. for Plaintiff: John Stewart Company, a California Corporation.
Plaintiff's witness: E. Ayres, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Steven Totress.
Exhibit 1 - McKinny Lease----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1095 Mission St., #215, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $199.36
Costs per cost bill.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOHN ZANGHI FOR PLAINITFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDENT STEVEN TOTRESS. HARLEY MARTIN, A LAW STUDENT,
APPEARED ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF TO NOTIFY COURT THAT DEFENDANT IS INCARCERATED.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

COMMISSIONER: SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
